title: TooManyOres
description: Add Many Interesting Ores, Armors, and Tools!
body:
#

TooManyOres Mod that allows you to use ores, armors, tools, and recipes that were not in Minecraft.

 

Features

TooManyOres contains many ores, armors, and tools.

 

  • There are rubies and serendibites in a deep cave.
  • There are jeremevites in a cave.
  • There are citrines in a amethyst geode.
  • You can get red diamonds from the red diamond temple.
  • You can craft ruby helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.
  • You can craft ruby sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and shovel.
  • You can craft red diamond helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.
  • You can craft red diamond sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and shovel.
  • You can craft serendibite helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.
  • You can craft serendibite sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and shovel.
  • You can craft copper helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.
  • You can craft copper sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and shovel.
  • You can craft lapis helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.
  • You can craft lapis sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and shovel.
  • You can craft redstone helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots.
  • You can craft redstone sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and shovel.

 

 

You can notify me of bugs using discord.

Create a server with Biscet Hosting, get 25% off your first month.
